prompt: Create a dreamy underwater fantasy portrait of a young woman from mid-thigh upward, standing still against a deep teal ocean background with tiny suspended particles and soft haze. She has very long, flowing, wavy pastel pink hair drifting weightlessly around her shoulders, with a coral-like hair ornament tucked on the right side of her head. She wears a delicate semi-sheer ivory white sleeveless slip dress with thin straps, a softly gathered waist, and gauzy fabric that looks ethereal underwater. Her skin is pale and softly lit, her posture is relaxed with both arms hanging down, and the composition is vertical, centered, and painterly-realistic with a muted cinematic glow. Add an opaque square censor block over the entire face, colored dusty mauve beige, obscuring all facial features while leaving the hair and body visible. Use soft focus, low contrast, subtle bloom, underwater diffusion, fine art fantasy photography mood, no text, no extra objects.
